text:
There was a tiny hedgehog named Holly...

Oh, well, how about this? Holly the hedgehog decided that she no longer wanted to live on the ground. Every night when she felt sleepy, Holly would scamper up into a tall sunflower head. There she’d lie curled up in the warm sunshine dreaming of far-off fields.

One day, Holly dreamt she saw a twinkling starscape full of tiny twinkling lights. There were tiny little hedgehogs dancing around an ancient oak tree. Someone was singing a song about love, sweet love. Holly felt like tapping feet all over the head.

When it was her turn, Holly danced energetically while tapping her feet to a rhythm she couldn’t quite make out but felt really good tapping her own toes.

She dreamed this was the beginning of a big party. All the hedgehogs would dance together under the moonlight. That night Holly knew she had to hold the party. Holly set to work collecting leaves, acorns
